Report.title: Report
Report.description: A civic issue report submitted by a citizen and analyzed by Gemini AI

category.description: The classified civic category of the issue (e.g., Road Hazard, Public Lighting, Sanitation)

severity.description: The assessed gravity of the reported issue

summary.description: A brief, AI-extracted summary of the issue

description.description: The user's original written explanation of the issue

imageUrl.description: Base64 string or image URL if uploaded

status.description: The resolution status of the civic issue

confirmations.description: The count of citizen community verifications confirming the issue

progressStage.description: The current progress stage of resolution

assignedTeam.description: The assigned municipal public works team

afterImageUrl.description: Image URL or base64 verification photo of the resolved repair

severityExplanation.description: Detailed multi-point bullet reasoning of chosen severity

confidence.description: The model visual or text analysis confidence score

rootCause.description: The inferred failure origin or systemic root cause

riskIfIgnored.description: The predicted escalating risk if the report is ignored

affectedCitizens.description: Estimated range of affected local citizens

schoolNearby.description: True if within close proximity of an educational facility

hospitalNearby.description: True if close to emergency routing or healthcare site

trafficDensity.description: Local calculated traffic speed/volume density category

estimatedCrew.description: Recommended repair crew size and specialties

equipment.description: Specialized machinery or tools required for repair

repeatedFailureDetected.description: True if coordinates have recurring recent issues

repeatedFailureMessage.description: Detailed warning notice for recurring coordinates

repeatedFailureRecommendation.description: Advanced technical or engineering remedy guidelines

Alert.title: Alert
Alert.description: An autonomous AI system-triggered emergency alert for recurring high severity issues

reportId.description: ID of the associated high severity report

category.description: The category of the alert issue

severity.description: The severity of the alert (always High)

summary.description: A summary of the emergency issue

/reports/{reportId}.description: A public registry of geotagged civic issue reports and their confirmation counts

/alerts/{alertId}.description: Autonomous AI-triggered alerts queue for high-priority repeated infrastructure issues
